strengths: Identifies three specific real-world objects with clear contextual details (dates, researchers, geopolitical background).
Provides sustained and explicit links between each object and the chosen IA prompt, demonstrating how each illustrates âimprovement upon past knowledge.â
Uses substantive, evidence-based justification (quantitative data, historical milestones, academic sources) to support the inclusion of each object.
Maintains focus on the TOK task through a concise title and consistent reference to the prompt throughout the commentary.
weaknesses: Introductory overview of how the three objects collectively address the prompt is missing, slightly affecting structural clarity.
Minor citation inconsistencies and occasional repetition across object analyses.
The commentary ends abruptly in one section, disrupting coherence.
Limited engagement with potential counter-perspectives or methodological criticisms, reducing depth of critical evaluation.
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: The strand assessment places this exhibition firmly in the 7â8 band: three well-contextualized objects, clear and mostly precise links to the IA prompt, and strong evidence-based justifications. The work demonstrates high quality in alignment, grounding, and argumentation, meriting the top of the band (8 points). Remaining minor issuesâstructural cohesion, occasional repetition, citation details, and deeper critical reflectionâpreclude a 9â10 band score. As there is a single gradable criterion, assigning the full 8 points satisfies the examinerâs total and accurately reflects the submissionâs strengths and minor limitations.

annotations.comment: Avoid including administrative details such as word count, which are not part of the TOK commentary and can distract from your analysis.
The exact date and location of the Himba study are omitted; including these details would increase precision and contextual depth.
The link to âimprovement upon past knowledgeâ is implied but not explicitly tied to the promptâs language â reference the wording directly for clarity.
The chemical diagram of gel precursors is visually clear and effectively supports the technical explanation of the battery innovation.
The diagram caption lacks full source details (e.g., journal name, publication date); include precise citation information for academic rigor.
Presenting the 40% energy density improvement provides a concrete measure of how the new battery advances past technological limitations.
Use LaTeX formatting for numerical expressions (e.g., $$40\%$$) to align with academic conventions for equations and data presentation.
Long URLs disrupt the flow of the Works Cited; consider using DOIs or embedding hyperlinks to improve readability.
Drawing on diverse source types (news, academic, NGO) demonstrates breadth in research and supports a well-rounded argument.
Verify that all hyperlinks are active and correctly formatted before final submission to ensure seamless source traceability.
The title succinctly states the selected IA prompt, ensuring the exhibitionâs focus is immediately clear and aligned with the TOK task requirements.
The submission lacks a brief introductory paragraph outlining how the three objects will collectively address the prompt; adding this would enhance structural clarity.
The description of the Himba experiment provides specific linguistic context and researcher references, giving strong real-world grounding.
The analysis clearly justifies that empirical measurements in the experiment strengthen the credibility of the Sapir-Whorf hypothesis, showing improvement over prior theory.
This section ends abruptly mid-sentence, disrupting the argumentâs flow; ensure all paragraphs are complete to maintain coherence.
Consider addressing potential methodological criticisms (e.g., sample size or generalisability) to deepen the critical evaluation beyond description.
The historical adoption date and purpose of the UDHR are clearly stated, grounding the documentâs real-world significance.
Elaborate on why siliconâs expansion had been a historical barrier; this contextualizes the significance of the gel-electrolyte improvement.
Address potential trade-offs of the gel polymer electrolyte (e.g., cost, scalability) to provide a balanced evaluation of the improvement.
Citation formatting varies between entries; adopt a consistent referencing style (APA, MLA, etc.) to enhance professionalism.
Reliance on Wikipedia in an IA reduces academic rigor; replace tertiary sources with peer-reviewed or primary research when possible.
Including access dates for online sources demonstrates attention to the currency and reliability of your references.
Several works cited (e.g., Amnesty International) are not directly referenced in the text; ensure all entries support specific claims.
When linking to the IA prompt, explicitly quote its wording to reinforce how the experiment illustrates âimprovement upon past knowledge.â
Including the full UDHR text is overly exhaustive; summarise or quote selectively to maintain focus on its relevance to the knowledge question.

rubricCriterionStrandBandContents.content: The exhibition does not reach the standard described by the other levels or does not use one of the IA prompts provided.

The exhibition presents
three objects, but the
real-world contexts of
these objects are not
stated, or the images
presented may be
highly generic images of
types of object rather
than of specific
real-world objects. Links
between the objects
and the selected IA
prompt are made, but
these are minimal,
tenuous, or it is not
clear what the student is
trying to convey.
There is very little
justification offered for
the inclusion of each
object in the exhibition.
The commentary on the
objects is highly
descriptive or consists
only of unsupported
assertions.

The exhibition identifies three objects, although the real-world contexts of the objects may be implied rather than explicitly stated. Basic links between the objects and the selected IA prompt are made, but the explanation of these links is unconvincing and/or unfocused. There is a superficial justification for the inclusion of each object in the exhibition. Reasons for the inclusion of the objects are offered, but these are not supported by appropriate evidence and/or lack relevance to the selected IA prompt. There may be significant repetition across the justifications of the different objects

The exhibition identifies three objects, although the real-world contexts of these objects may be vaguely or imprecisely stated. There is some explanation of the links between the three objects and the selected IA prompt. There is some justification for the inclusion of each object in the exhibition. Some of the points are supported by evidence and references to the selected IA prompt.

The exhibition identifies three objects and their real-world contexts. Links between each of the three objects and the selected IA prompt are explained, although this explanation may lack precision and clarity in parts. There is a justification of the contribution that each individual object makes to the exhibition. Many of the points are supported by appropriate evidence and references to the selected IA prompt.

The exhibition clearly identifies three objects and their specific real-world contexts. Links between each of the three objects and the selected IA prompt are clearly made and well-explained. There is a strong justification of the particular contribution that each individual object makes to the exhibition. All, or nearly all, of the points are well-supported by appropriate evidence and explicit references to the selected IA prompt.
